JavaScript testing tools and configurations with ESLint, Mocha, and Unroll, plus emoji and syntax test files.

## Folders
- **[fixtures](fixtures/README.md)**: JavaScript files for testing emoji strings and syntax errors.

## Files
- **[.eslintrc.js](.eslintrc.js.md)**: ESLint configuration for enforcing code style rules in a JavaScript environment.
- **[package.json](package.json.md)**: Configuration for JavaScript unit tests with Mocha and ESLint dependencies and scripts.
- **[test_js_tooling.js](test_js_tooling.js.md)**: Tests for the JavaScript tooling compiler using Mocha and Unroll.
